profile: Backend Developer with over 6 years of experience designing scalable API architectures and microservices for enterprise SaaS platforms using TypeScript, Python, and Golang. Built and maintained backend systems serving thousands of concurrent users with high availability and consistent uptime. Designed real-time processing pipelines and queue-based architectures that reduced data processing latency by 40% and lowered infrastructure costs by 25%. Integrated LLM and RAG pipelines into production backends, enabling AI-driven features across B2B products. Participated in backend migrations from monoliths to microservices, improving deployment frequency and maintaining zero-downtime releases.

projects.name: Outbound Voice Agents – Lead Calling System
projects.description: Automated outbound calling system that dials leads from CSV uploads, follows scripted flows, and logs call outcomes in a dashboard.
features: Designed and built the backend pipeline architecture for automated call orchestration and lead management
Integrated Twilio VoIP APIs for programmatic outbound calling with real-time call state management
Built ElevenLabs voice synthesis integration for natural-sounding AI agent conversations
Implemented queue-based processing for handling concurrent call sessions with retry logic and outcome logging

projects.name: Talent Search – Natural Language Enterprise Search
projects.description: Recruiter tool enabling natural language queries against indexed talent databases for intelligent candidate matching.
features: Built the NLP-powered search backend with document processing and indexing pipelines
Designed REST APIs for complex query handling supporting filters, facets, and natural language input
Implemented vector search integration for semantic matching of candidate profiles to job requirements
Optimized database queries and caching layers for sub-second search response times at scale

projects.name: Dubio.ai – AI Dubbing & Voice Cloning
projects.description: Dubbing platform that detects speakers, clones each voice, translates dialogue, and outputs dubbed video in another language.
features: Architected the backend orchestration pipeline for multi-stage audio/video processing workflows
Built API integrations with Coqui XTS and open-source voice models for speaker-specific voice cloning
Designed AWS-based infrastructure for scalable media processing with job queuing and progress tracking
Implemented translation pipeline APIs connecting speech-to-text, translation, and text-to-speech services
